backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four UI features (unified header, content clearance, scroll-hide behavior, hero gap) to their relevant files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a CTA button for the Phoenix, AZ service area.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying owner Jasmine Cota's profile, clickable phone number, service area, and availability details in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info for Jasmine Cota, copyright notice, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix, AZ' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a logo, site name, tagline, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu. Hides on scroll-down and reappears on scroll-up using the useScrollDirection hook.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the restaurant logo, title, tagline, and CTA buttons to explore the menu or call for catering, with a background image and scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, chips & salsa) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, badges, and optional protein choice selectors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, indicating this is a static frontend with no data-fetching hooks needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers with a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette for both light and dark themes, plus custom font and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), a Mexican-inspired color palette (chili, sienna, gold, verde, cream), custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' Mexican catering website project, documenting existing features (unified header, scroll-hide behavior, hero spacing), known issues (split header, hero overlap), and architectural notes for a single consolidated auto-hiding header bar.
